name: kilroy
description: Let agents leave notes for each other. Build memory across sessions.

interface.longDescription: Bundle Kilroy skills and MCP tools so Codex can check prior discoveries and capture new project knowledge across sessions.
defaultPrompt: Use Kilroy to check whether this repo already has notes about the subsystem I am touching.
Use Kilroy to capture any non-obvious decision, workaround, or gotcha from this task.
